headline: Cell Therapy Technology Market Research and Global Forecast Report 2025-2030: Rising Chronic Disease Burden and CRISPR-Driven Gene Editing Innovations Driving Growth
summary: The global cell therapy technologies market is set to grow from USD 4.41 billion in 2025 to USD 7.91 billion by 2030, achieving a CAGR of 12.4%. Key growth drivers include advancements in regenerative medicine, increasing chronic disease prevalence, robust R&D investments, and innovations in gene editing, particularly CRISPR. The T-cells segment is projected to lead with the highest CAGR, spurred by the success of CAR-T and TCR therapies. The US remains a dominant player in North America, benefi

headline: Allergy Diagnostic Market by Product & Service, Test Type, Allergen, End User - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The allergy diagnostic market is set to surge, projected to reach USD 10.77 billion by 2030 from USD 6.80 billion in 2025, at a CAGR of 9.6%. Technological innovation in diagnostics, such as multiplex immunoassays and molecular allergology, drives this growth by enhancing test accuracy and efficiency.
